name: recruitcrm-mcp-server
description: Recruit CRM MCP Server - access candidates, jobs, companies, and more from Recruit CRM
long_description: A Model Context Protocol server for Recruit CRM. Search and retrieve candidates, jobs, companies, call logs, meetings, tasks, notes, and hiring stage history from your Recruit CRM account.

api_token.title: Recruit CRM API Token
api_token.description: Your Recruit CRM API token (found in Settings → API & Integrations)

tools.name: search_candidates
tools.description: Search candidates with filters and return compact summaries.

tools.name: list_candidates
tools.description: List all candidates with pagination/sorting only (no filter required).

tools.name: search_jobs
tools.description: Search jobs with filters and return compact summaries.

tools.name: list_jobs
tools.description: List all jobs with pagination/sorting only (no filter required).

tools.name: search_companies
tools.description: Search companies with filters and return compact summaries.

tools.name: list_companies
tools.description: List all companies with pagination/sorting only (no filter required).

tools.name: search_tasks
tools.description: Search tasks and return compact summaries with related entity context.

tools.name: search_meetings
tools.description: Search meetings and return compact summaries with scheduling metadata.

tools.name: search_notes
tools.description: Search notes and return compact summaries with related entity context.

tools.name: search_call_logs
tools.description: Search call logs and return compact summaries with related entity context.

tools.name: get_candidate_details
tools.description: Fetch one candidate by slug and return the raw Recruit CRM payload.

tools.name: get_job_details
tools.description: Fetch one job by slug and return the raw Recruit CRM payload.

tools.name: get_job_assigned_candidates
tools.description: Fetch candidates assigned to a job with compact assignment summaries.

tools.name: list_candidate_hiring_stages
tools.description: List candidate hiring stage labels and ids.

tools.name: get_candidate_job_assignment_hiring_stage_history
tools.description: Fetch a candidate's job assignment hiring stage history.

tools.name: list_candidate_custom_fields
tools.description: List searchable candidate custom field metadata.

tools.name: get_candidate_custom_field_details
tools.description: Fetch details for one candidate custom field.
